scripts.deploy:scorecard-detection: npm run clean && npm run gcp-build && export $(cat .env | xargs) && gcloud config set project $GCLOUD_PROJECT_ID && gcloud functions deploy ExtractScorecardInformation --set-env-vars GOOGLE_GEMINI_API_KEY=$GOOGLE_GEMINI_API_KEY --gen2 --region=europe-north1 --runtime=nodejs24 --trigger-http --allow-unauthenticated --entry-point=ExtractScorecardInformation --source=.
scripts.start:generate-player-biography: npm run gcp-build && export $(cat .env | xargs) && npx functions-framework --target=GeneratePlayerBiography --source=dist/functions/generate-player-biography/index.js
scripts.deploy:generate-player-biography: npm run clean && npm run gcp-build && export $(cat .env | xargs) && gcloud config set project $GCLOUD_PROJECT_ID && gcloud functions deploy GeneratePlayerBiography --set-env-vars GOOGLE_GEMINI_API_KEY=$GOOGLE_GEMINI_API_KEY --set-env-vars ASTROSITE_API_KEY=$ASTROSITE_API_KEY --gen2 --region=europe-north1 --runtime=nodejs24 --trigger-http --allow-unauthenticated --entry-point=GeneratePlayerBiography --source=. --timeout=540s
scripts.deploy:generate-player-avatar: npm run clean && npm run gcp-build && export $(cat .env | xargs) && gcloud config set project $GCLOUD_PROJECT_ID && gcloud functions deploy GeneratePlayerAvatar --set-env-vars GOOGLE_GEMINI_API_KEY=$GOOGLE_GEMINI_API_KEY --set-env-vars ASTROSITE_API_KEY=$ASTROSITE_API_KEY --gen2 --region=europe-north1 --runtime=nodejs24 --trigger-http --allow-unauthenticated --entry-point=GeneratePlayerAvatar --source=. --timeout=540s
scripts.deploy:all: npm run deploy:scorecard-detection && npm run deploy:generate-player-biography && npm run deploy:generate-player-avatar
